h2: 9 Stylish Planking and Fireplace Combinations We Love

paragraphs: Do you like sitting outside around a warm fire? Or how about snuggling indoors near a fireplace, do you like that too? If you answered yes to both, we have the perfect fireplace for you! Meet the Stellar by Heat & Glo Transcend Collection: Bringing warmth and beauty to both an indoor and outdoor space–with one fireplace.

That’s right. The Twilight series are see-through, high-warmth fireplaces that also act as a window. It makes it possible to enjoy impressive fireside views from both inside and outside your house all year long, doubling the ambiance and enjoyment from just one fireplace.

Because they feature a closed system, Twilight fireplaces provide a safe environment for enjoying fires within an arm’s length on outdoor patios, decks or terraces. Perfect for remodeling projects, there is no need for an exterior vent cap since the outdoor face of the fireplace acts as a vent. This allows for more versatile placement locations while making installation less complicated and allowing for a clean exterior appearance.
The Twilight II has realistic logs and ember design while the Twilight Modern is a sleek contemporary model, featuring flames that rise through modern media and reflect on a black porcelain firebox.
The Primo II offers a modern, linear indoor/outdoor option that brings a sophisticated style to your living space.
Now you can have your cake and eat it too – indoors AND out! Learn more about the Twilight II, Twilight Modern, and the Primo II or by connecting with your local authorized Heat & Glo dealer.

Enjoy the fire yearlong, from either side. Venting in the Twilight see-through indoor/outdoor fireplace gives you freedom in designing two spaces, including windows above the fire to expand fireside views.
The first indoor/outdoor gas fireplace trends ahead with the Twilight Modern see-through model. Artistic flames rise through crushed glass with no chimney or venting needed in a contemporary design.

Elevate two spaces at once. Whether an interior room divider or a beautiful bridge for indoor-outdoor living, the Primo II gas linear fireplace is a stunning addition. Built-in heat management makes it safe to install your TV above this fireplace, with mere inches in between. Available in 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.
8 ways to warm up to wooden fireplace surrounds.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
